description_for_human: Search corporate events and retrieve earnings call transcripts with optional sentiment analysis via Aiera.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to search for corporate events (earnings calls, presentations, shareholder meetings), retrieve event metadata, and get full speaker-tagged transcripts with optional NLP linguistics (sentiment, topics, summaries) via the Aiera Events API. Maps to Aiera REST API endpoints: GET /events-v2, GET /events-v2/{id}, GET /events-v2/{id}/transcript.

functions.name: find_events
functions.description: Search for corporate events (earnings calls, presentations, shareholder meetings) by company, date range, or event type via Aiera Events API.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol to filter events (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

start_date.description: Start date filter in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01)

end_date.description: End date filter in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-12-31)

with_transcripts.description: If true, filter to only events that have transcripts available

functions.name: get_event_details
functions.description: Retrieve full metadata for a specific corporate event including title, date, participants, and status.

event_id.description: Aiera event ID for the specific corporate event

functions.name: get_transcript
functions.description: Retrieve the full speaker-tagged transcript for a corporate event, with optional sentiment analysis, topic extraction, and section tags (Q&A, presentation).

event_id.description: Aiera event ID for the specific corporate event

linguistics.description: If true, include NLP-derived sentiment scores, topic extraction, and summaries

include_tags.description: If true, include section breakdown tags (e.g., Q&A, presentation)

modified_since.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to retrieve only updates since this time (useful for live call partial updates)
